## Meeting Purpose

[To address questions about Scrunch AI's functionality and discuss reporting capabilities for client performance.](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Site audits provide insights on SEO optimization for AI visibility, including robots.txt rules and JavaScript content accessibility](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Scrunch uses "incognito mode" for LLM queries to depersonalize results, with US as the default location (customizable)](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Month-over-month reporting capabilities are limited in-app, but Looker Studio integration offers more robust options](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Team is working on adding custom date ranges and improving data visualization (e.g., line charts instead of donuts)](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)

## Topics

### Site Audit Functionality

  - [Scrunch's chatbot checks specific criteria for AI visibility optimization](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Recommendations include ensuring robots.txt allows key AI bots](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Non-JavaScript versions should match JavaScript versions for LLM indexing](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Only Gemini can read JavaScript; other LLMs require HTML replication](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Audit focuses on single URLs; multiple key pages should be tested](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

### LLM Query Depersonalization

  - [Scrunch uses "incognito mode" to submit generic, depersonalized prompts](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Removes geographic biases unless specified in context settings](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Default location is US; other countries can be selected in the context tab](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Future update will allow state and major metropolitan area selection](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)

### Reporting Capabilities

  - [Current in-app options limited for month-over-month comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [New Looker Studio templates available for agencies and enterprise customers](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Custom date ranges being added for more flexible reporting](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Data export to spreadsheets currently required for detailed monthly analysis](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Team working on updating visualization from donut to line charts](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)

### Looker Integration

  - [API documentation available for custom Looker integration](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - Team will create a shared user account (<teams@growthxlabs.com>) with necessary permissions
  - [Support available for setting up API key and Looker connection](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)

### Client Access Management

  - [Process explained for adding new clients to Scrunch dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Support team can assist in creating user accounts and assigning brand access](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

  - [Andrew to update Mariana's permissions for creating new brands](https://fathom.video/share/EktXhCnz2et2cyrpffdNbKRYqJtzstRB?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
